title: Culturing Symbiodinium
author: Tingting Xiang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qg8dtzw
materials: Let it cool to room temperature.

steps.title: Dissolve 37
steps.instruction: Dissolve 37.1 g Coral Pro salt into 1L pure water; check the salinity of the dissolved seawater and make sure it is between 32-34. This step of dissolving sea salts may take a while, stir overnight is recommended.

steps.title: Dissolve 0
steps.instruction: Dissolve 0.4 g casein hydroplysate into 90 mL ASW, and transfer to a clean 250 mL PYREX Glass Erlenmeyer Flask, and cover with aluminum foil; Please note to use enzymatic digest casein hydrolysate, the hydrochloric acid hydrolysate of casein may not dissolve well in ASW.

steps.title: Autoclave at 121 ºC for 30...
steps.instruction: Autoclave at 121 ºC for 30 minutes; and let it cool down to room temperature. There might be some precipitation after autoclave, filter through a 0. 45µm filter is recommended to get rid of the precipitation.

steps.title: Pick single colonies from agar plates...
steps.instruction: Pick single colonies from agar plates which contain the Symbiodinium colonies; Image showing Symbiodinium colonies on a solid plate.

steps.title: Artificial seawater (ASW) is the base...
steps.instruction: Artificial seawater (ASW) is the base for most of the media, except Marine Broth.

steps.title: Transfer 90 mL ASW into a...
steps.instruction: Transfer 90 mL ASW into a 250 mL PYREX Glass Erlenmeyer Flask, and cover with aluminum foil;

steps.title: Add 10 mL Daigo's IMK Medium...
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution to the flask; and that makes 100 mL IMK.

steps.title: Dissolve 2
steps.instruction: Dissolve 2.56g Daigo's IMK Medium powder into 1L ASW; Daigo's IMK Medium is the base of IMK medium.

steps.title: Filter sterile the 10X Daigo's IMK...
steps.instruction: Filter sterile the 10X Daigo's IMK Medium solution through a 0.22 µm filter; Here is the recipe of Daigo' IMK Medium, which contains nutrients such as vitamins. Therefore, filter sterilization is highly recommended instead of autoclave sterilization.

steps.title: Add 10 mL Daigo stock solution...
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL Daigo stock solution to the flask; and that makes 100 mL IMK+Glc medium.

steps.title: Add 10 mL Daigo's IMK Medium...
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution to the flask; and that makes 100 mL IMK+cas medium.

steps.title: Dissolve 37
steps.instruction: Dissolve 37.4 g MB powder into 1L pure water;

steps.title: Transfer the liquid to a new 1L glass container;
steps.instruction: Transfer the liquid to a new 1L glass container;

steps.title: Grow the cultures at 27ºC under...
steps.instruction: Grow the cultures at 27ºC under 10 µmol photons m -2 s -1 white light.

steps.title: Bring the flask from step 7...
steps.instruction: Bring the flask from step 7 and 10X Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution from step 4 to a sterile hood;

steps.title: Bring the flask from step 12...
steps.instruction: Bring the flask from step 12 and 10X Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution from step 4 to a sterile hood;

steps.title: Dissolve 0
steps.instruction: Dissolve 0.5 g glucose into 90 mL ASW, and cover with aluminum foil;

steps.title: Bring the flask from step 17...
steps.instruction: Bring the flask from step 17 and 10X Daigo's IMK Medium stock solution from step 4 to a sterile hood;
